nodes.title: Render Business Layout Shell
nodes.description: When route /biz/:bizId activates, render `app-sidebar`, `app-header`, `app-breadcrumbs`, and a `router-outlet` inside a RTL container. Layout holds header + breadcrumbs + content area as the shared shell for all business pages.

nodes.title: Watch bizId Route Parameter
nodes.description: When `bizId` changes in the parent route params, BasePageComponent triggers onBizIdChange with parsed integer. If `bizId` is valid, flow continues to refresh business context.

nodes.title: Load and Save Business Context
nodes.description: When bizId is valid, call `api.getBusiness(bizId)` and then `bizService.setBusiness(biz.id, biz.name, biz.color, biz.icon, biz.type ?? 'stations')`. Success: shared state is updated so header/sidebar reflect selected business.

nodes.title: Fallback To Home On Invalid Business
nodes.description: When loading business context fails (network/auth/invalid id), clear error handling by navigating to `/`. Failure behavior should keep user out of stale layout state.
